description: Checks whether project context and rough budget survive later task requests.

timeline.user: I'm starting a home renovation project in Orange County.
The rough budget is about $200k, but I want to avoid sounding too locked in when talking to contractors.

timeline.query: Write an email to follow up on the renovation cost with the general contractor.

evaluation.scoring_rubric: The answer should pull in project context without pretending the budget is exact.

expected_memories.description: Home renovation project has a rough budget around $200k.

probe.command: SEARCH CONCEPT "home renovation budget 200k Orange County" MODE "semantic" THRESHOLD 0.6 LIMIT 10
